title: LevelZ (RPG Series) Compat
description: this mod brings parity with several rpg series mods and levelz
body:
# OUTDATED! ## Use [RAY's LevelZ Compat](https://modrinth.com/mod/rays-levelz-compat) instead. ![rpgseriescompatlevelz_title_wide](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/xR4YM0ND/RPG-Series-Compat-LevelZ/refs/heads/1.21.1/Gallery/rpgseriescompatlevelz_title_wide.png) this mod brings parity with several [rpg series mods](https://modrinth.com/user/ZsoltMolnarrr) and [levelz](https://modrinth.com/mod/levelz) ## Supported Mods
- [Archers (RPG Series)](https://modrinth.com/mod/archers) - [Jewelry (RPG Series)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jewelry) - [Paladins & Priests (RPG Series)](https://modrinth.com/mod/paladins-and-priests) - [Relics (RPG Series)](https://modrinth.com/mod/relics-rpg) - [Rogues & Warriors (RPG Series)](https://modrinth.com/mod/rogues-and-warriors) - [Wizards (RPG Series)](https://modrinth.com/mod/wizards)
## Customization You can disable each compat in the `rpgseriescompatlevelz.json5` config file. *Compats only load if the mod is loaded & the config is set to true (default)* ## Credits
